title: Beyond Supremacy: Practical Quantum Advantage
description: Exploring the path from quantum supremacy demonstrations to practical quantum advantage in real-world applications, including NISQ algorithms, error mitigation, and fault-tolerant computing.
learningObjectives: Distinguish between quantum supremacy and practical quantum advantage
Understand NISQ limitations and near-term algorithm strategies
Implement error mitigation techniques for improved results
Analyze the path to fault-tolerant quantum computing
Evaluate application domains where quantum advantage is most likely
